name: Coffee Tortoni
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the coconut and chopped almonds.
2. Whip the egg white with coffee, gradually adding 2 tablespoons of sugar.
3. Whip the cream, then add the remaining sugar, vanilla, and almond extract.
4. Fold the cream into the egg mixture; add the toasted coconut and almonds.
5. Pour into fluted paper baking cups.
6. Sprinkle with additional coconut if desired.
7. Freeze for 2 hours or more.
Serves 6
